Warning: no stdin data received in 3s, proceeding without it. If piping from a slow command, redirect stdin explicitly: < /dev/null to skip, or wait longer.

tmp=$(mktemp -d); git -C \\\"$tmp\\\" init -q; git -C \\\"$tmp\\\" checkout -q -b feature/xyz; git -C \\\"$tmp\\\" commit -q --allow-empty -m init; out=$(cd \\\"$tmp\\\" && \\\"$CLI_BIN\\\"); test \\\"$out\\\" = \\\"feature/xyz\\\"\",\n        \"env\": { \"CLI_BIN\": \"./bin/git-branch\" },\n        \"expect_exit\": 0\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"id\": \"cli_nonzero_outside_git_repo\",\n      \"provider\": \"custom_script\",\n      \"description\": \"Running the CLI outside any git repository exits with a non-zero status and writes nothing to stdout (error goes to stderr).\",\n      \"config\": {\n        \"script\": \"tmp=$(mktemp -d); out=$(cd \\\"$tmp\\\" && \\\"$CLI_BIN\\\" 2>/dev/null); code=$?; test $code -ne 0 && test -z \\\"$out\\\"\",\n        \"env\": { \"CLI_BIN\": \"./bin/git-branch\" }\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"id\": \"cli_detached_head_handled\",\n      \"provider\": \"custom_script\",\n      \"description\": \"In detached HEAD state the CLI does not crash: it exits 0 and prints a stable sentinel (e.g. 'HEAD' or the short SHA) rather than an empty line or a stack trace.\",\n      \"config\": {\n        \"script\": \"set -e; tmp=$(mktemp -d); git -C \\\"$tmp\\\" init -q; git -C \\\"$tmp\\\" commit -q --allow-empty -m init; sha=$(git -C \\\"$tmp\\\" rev-parse HEAD); git -C \\\"$tmp\\\" checkout -q \\\"$sha\\\"; out=$(cd \\\"$tmp\\\" && \\\"$CLI_BIN\\\"); test -n \\\"$out\\\"\",\n        \"env\": { \"CLI_BIN\": \"./bin/git-branch\" },\n        \"expect_exit\": 0\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"id\": \"unit_tests_pass\",\n      \"provider\": \"test_runner\",\n      \"description\": \"The project's automated test suite for the branch-name CLI passes.\",\n      \"config\": { \"command\": \"go test ./...\", \"expect_exit\": 0 }\n    },\n    {\n      \"id\": \"coverage_floor\",\n      \"provider\": \"coverage\",\n      \"description\": \"Line coverage of the CLI's source is at or above 80%.\",\n      \"config\": { \"min_percent\": 80 }\n    },\n    {\n      \"id\": \"builds_and_lints_clean\",\n      \"provider\": \"static\",\n      \"description\": \"The CLI compiles and passes static analysis / lint with no errors.\",\n      \"config\": { \"build\": true, \"lint\": true }\n    }\n  ],\n  \"rationale\": \"The conjunction pins the core behavior (correct branch on a known branch) plus the two failure modes that distinguish a real tool from a one-liner -- outside-a-repo and detached-HEAD -- each checked objectively by running the binary, alongside passing tests, a coverage floor, and a clean build. Deliberately out of scope: output formatting beyond the bare branch name, flags/help text, worktree edge cases, and performance, none of which the idea asserts.\"\n}","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"d6412782-0544-43d9-8e6b-17e2fc2cfc63","total_cost_usd":0.253458,"usage":{"input_tokens":12213,"cache_creation_input_tokens":14845,"cache_read_input_tokens":14286,"output_tokens":1472,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":14845,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":12213,"output_tokens":1472,"cache_read_input_tokens":14286,"cache_creation_input_tokens":14845,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":14845},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-8[1m]":{"inputTokens":12213,"outputTokens":1472,"cacheReadInputTokens":14286,"cacheCreationInputTokens":14845,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.253458,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"f5b52063-3400-4247-b629-b71a6c325b64"}
